evals.prompt: I finished the fix for the nil-pointer bug in tableapi, can you get this into a PR?
evals.expected_output: Commits the uncommitted fix in tableapi with a Conventional Commit message, pushes the existing feature branch (fix/tableapi-nil-pointer) without creating a new one, drafts a PR title/body, confirms with the user, then opens the PR. Never merges.
assertions: Creates a real commit ahead of main rather than leaving the fix uncommitted
Commit message follows Conventional Commits format, scope tableapi or similar
Does NOT create a new branch — reuses the existing feature branch
Pushes the branch to origin before attempting to open a PR
Shows drafted PR title and body and waits for confirmation before calling gh pr create
PR title matches Conventional Commit format
Does not call gh pr merge

evals.expected_output: Detects dirty working tree on main, creates a new type/kebab-description branch, commits the changes with a Conventional Commit message, pushes, drafts and confirms a PR title/body, then opens the PR. Never merges.
assertions: Does not commit directly to main
Creates a new branch off main with a type/kebab-description name before committing
Commits with a Conventional Commits message
Pushes the new branch to origin
Shows drafted PR title and body and waits for confirmation before calling gh pr create
PR title matches Conventional Commit format
Does not call gh pr merge

evals.prompt: is PR #474 in michaeldcanady/servicenow-sdk-go ready to merge?
evals.expected_output: Runs a read-only gh pr checks/gh pr view against the real PR, reports status in plain terms, and never calls gh pr merge or attempts to create a PR/branch.
assertions: Runs a read-only status check against the real PR
Reports actual check/merge status back in plain terms
Does NOT call gh pr merge under any circumstance
Does not attempt to create a new PR or branch
